<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''Ghost Reapers''' ('''[GR]''') ( May 2004 - July 2004) was a [[Lamda Bunker]] [[Rifles]] playing clan. It was being recognized for the rule which stated that every member must use the Ghost skin. On 22nd of July in 2004 Ghost Reapers renamed themselves to [[United States of America]] clan and started recruiting only North American players.

== Members ==
=== Leader ===
* Halo

=== Normal members ===
* FaLlEn
* NemesIs
* SpongeBob

== Clan Wars ==
=== Won ===
N/A

=== Lost ===
* TbfC.ee (4:1)

=== Tied ===
N/A

== See also ==
* [[United States of America]]

== External links ==
* [http://www.grclan.freewebspace.com/ Ghost Reapers home page]
* [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=15961 Ghost Reapers thread at GU]

[[Category:Clans]]
[[Category:Retired clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721135524/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Ghost_Reapers -->
